summary: Tested 'Actual Onboarded Month & Year' fields feature. All 9 features verified: Lead edit form shows dropdowns, Lead API accepts/returns onboarded fields, Account edit form shows dropdowns, Account API accepts/returns onboarded fields, Account read-only displays formatted month/year, Performance Tracker uses onboarded_month/year for new accounts, Lead-to-account conversion propagates fields.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test lead ID: 2a3ca2de-8e26-406a-8be0-d9a28adfc0fb
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarded Month/Year feature fully tested. Backend models (Lead, LeadUpdate, Account, AccountUpdate) include onboarded_month/year fields. Frontend AddEditLead.js has dropdowns with data-testid='lead-onboarded-month-select' and 'lead-onboarded-year-select'. AccountDetail.js has edit dropdowns with data-testid='edit-onboarded-month' and 'edit-onboarded-year', and read-only display with data-testid='account-onboarded-display'. Performance Tracker at /api/performance/generate uses onboarded_month/year for new accounts calculation (priority over won_date).

Lead_Edit_Form_Dropdowns.details: AddEditLead.js shows 'Actual Onboarded Month' and 'Actual Onboarded Year' dropdowns in Lead Information section with data-testid='lead-onboarded-month-select' and 'lead-onboarded-year-select'

Lead_Update_API.details: PUT /api/leads/{id} accepts and persists onboarded_month and onboarded_year. Tested updating from month=3 to month=4 and back.

Lead_GET_API.details: GET /api/leads/{id} returns onboarded_month and onboarded_year fields. Test lead has onboarded_month=3, onboarded_year=2026

Account_Edit_Form_Dropdowns.details: AccountDetail.js edit mode shows 'Actual Onboarded Month' and 'Actual Onboarded Year' dropdowns with data-testid='edit-onboarded-month' and 'edit-onboarded-year'

Account_Update_API.details: PUT /api/accounts/{id} accepts and persists onboarded_month and onboarded_year

Account_GET_API.details: GET /api/accounts and GET /api/accounts/{id} return onboarded_month and onboarded_year fields

Account_ReadOnly_Display.details: AccountDetail.js read-only view shows 'Actual Onboarded' with formatted month/year (e.g., 'Feb 2026') with data-testid='account-onboarded-display'

Performance_Tracker_Uses_Onboarded_Field.details: GET /api/performance/generate returns accounts.new_accounts based on onboarded_month/year matching the requested month/year. Falls back to won_date if onboarded fields not set.

Lead_To_Account_Conversion_Propagates_Fi.details: POST /api/accounts/convert-lead at server.py line 4895-4896 propagates onboarded_month and onboarded_year from lead to account
